claim_title: Markdown documentation line count exceeds Python line count

results.description: Verify documentation surface was reduced after SDC extraction.
results.command:
source .venv/bin/activate && python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path

exclude = {
    ".git",
    ".venv",
    ".pytest_cache",
    ".mypy_cache",
    ".ruff_cache",
    ".uv_cache",
    "htmlcov",
}
md_lines = py_lines = 0
in_repo_sdc_md_lines = 0

for p in Path(".").rglob("*"):
    if not p.is_file() or any(part in exclude for part in p.parts):
        continue
    if p.suffix == ".md":
        line_count = sum(1 for _ in p.open("r", encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore"))
        md_lines += line_count
        if p.parts and p.parts[0] == "sdc_2024_replication":
            in_repo_sdc_md_lines += line_count
    elif p.suffix == ".py":
        py_lines += sum(1 for _ in p.open("r", encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore"))

print(f"MD_LINES={md_lines}")
print(f"PY_LINES={py_lines}")
print(f"IN_REPO_SDC_MD_LINES={in_repo_sdc_md_lines}")

if in_repo_sdc_md_lines == 0 and md_lines < 120000 and md_lines <= py_lines + 20000:
    print("ASSERTION=PASS")
else:
    print("ASSERTION=FAIL")
    raise SystemExit(1)
PY
